### Summary

What needs to be tested or validated?

---

### Reason

Why is this test needed?

Example:
The credentials editor changes sensitive user data, so password visibility and copy behavior should be manually tested before release.

---

### Test type

- [ ] Manual UI test
- [ ] Build validation
- [ ] Unit test
- [ ] Integration test
- [ ] Regression test
- [ ] Security/privacy test
- [ ] Localization test
- [ ] Other:

---

- [ ] Dashboard
- [ ] Network
- [ ] Settings
- [ ] Credentials
- [ ] Report Form
- [ ] Localization
- [ ] Security / Keychain
- [ ] Other:

---

### Test scenario

Describe the scenario.

Example:
User adds credentials, edits them, toggles password visibility, copies values, deletes credentials, and confirms that no value disappears unexpectedly.

### Expected result

What should happen?

---

### Acceptance criteria

- [ ] Test steps are clear
- [ ] Expected result is clear
- [ ] Test was executed manually or automated
- [ ] Result was documented
- [ ] Any discovered bug has a linked bug issue
